message.content:
@startuml
title PFD flow between Openness and 5G core

actor "Admin" as Admin

package "OpenNESS Controller Components" {
  participant "UI/CLI" as UI_CLI
  participant "Af Microservice" as Af_Microservice
}

package "5G Core Components" {
  participant "NEF" as NEF
  participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC_CP_Function
  note right of NEF
    OpenNESS provided
    Core component with
    limited functionality
  end note
}

Admin --> UI_CLI : Request all PFD transactions
UI_CLI --> Af_Microservice : af/v1/pfd/transaction GET
Af_Microservice --> NEF : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/GET
NEF --> NGC_CP_Function : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
NGC_CP_Function --> NEF : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
NEF --> Af_Microservice : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
Af_Microservice --> UI_CLI : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
UI_CLI --> Admin : PFD details

Admin --> UI_CLI : Request transaction with transactionId
UI_CLI --> Af_Microservice : af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId} GET
Af_Microservice --> NEF : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId} GET
NEF --> NGC_CP_Function : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
NGC_CP_Function --> NEF : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
NEF --> Af_Microservice : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
Af_Microservice --> UI_CLI : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
UI_CLI --> Admin : PFD details

Admin --> UI_CLI : Request transactions with applicationId
UI_CLI --> Af_Microservice : af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{applId} GET
Af_Microservice --> NEF : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{applId} GET
NEF --> NGC_CP_Function : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
NGC_CP_Function --> NEF : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
NEF --> Af_Microservice : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
Af_Microservice --> UI_CLI : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
UI_CLI --> Admin : PFD details

@enduml
